subject: feat(icons): add Sharp-based icon generator from single SVG source
body:
Single SVG source (assets/icon-source.svg) generates all PWA icon PNGs
via Sharp at 400 DPI for crisp edges. Replaces manually-maintained PNGs.

New files:
- assets/icon-source.svg — 1024x1024, geometricPrecision, safe zone
- scripts/generate-icons.mjs — Sharp conversion (4 sizes)
- public/favicon.png — 48x48 PNG favicon for older browsers
- public/icon-1024-maskable.png — full-bleed maskable (was 512)

Removed:
- public/icon-512-maskable.png — replaced by 1024 version
- public/icon-maskable.svg — replaced by assets/icon-source.svg

PWA manifest updated: separate purpose values (any: 192+512, maskable:
1024). Added PNG favicon link to index.html. npm run generate:icons.

SVG design rules: square canvas, full-bleed bg, content in inner 80%
safe zone, legible at 48px, shape-rendering="geometricPrecision".

Tags: icons, pwa, sharp, build-script
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: minor
